Your side's commission. Used to project income on the Reports tab.

Edit freely, then copy it or open your email. "Sent it" logs the contact and resets the 90-day clock.

Seller Update

Auto-drafted from your listing and logged activity. Fill in any [bracketed] live MLS numbers, edit freely, then copy or email it.

Import planner from Google Doc

Open your Google Doc, select all (Ctrl/Cmd+A), copy, and paste below. Dated lines like 7/1/2026 / WEDNESDAY become day entries; the COMING SELLERS, COMING BUYERS, and ACTIVE sections fill the standing lists.

Home

Capture a buyer

Someone called about one of our listings? They're a buyer. Log them.
Ask these, in this order: Are you working with an agent?  ·  What's your timeline?  ·  What's your price range?
If this home isn't right — "I've got three others that might be. Can I send them over?"

New Lead from Website

Paste the website notification email (save-home alert, valuation request, contact form). I'll pull out the name, contact info, address, and any search criteria.
